$comment: CMLB vcpkg manifest. Reproducibility is anchored by `builtin-baseline`
below — every dependency resolves to its version at that baseline SHA.
Update the baseline with:  git -C <vcpkg-root> rev-parse HEAD
and bump both this file and vcpkg-configuration.json in lockstep.
Version floors (version>=) are intentionally omitted: the baseline
is the source of truth, and adding incompatible floors causes the
name: cmlb

telegram.description: Pull TDLib for the real Telegram gateway (vs. the build-only stub). Required for any real bot run; not required for unit tests of layers that don't touch TDLib.

coverage.description: Enable additional tooling required for coverage builds.
